data.revised_prompt: Generate a professional photorealistic headshot portrait of a friendly Caucasian woman in her early 30s, originally from Australia. She has warm brown eyes and light auburn hair. Her makeup is subtle and she is wearing a modern navy blazer. Her look is accompanied by a soft, confident smile and the image is set against a neutral grey studio background. This image should be styled in the manner of high-end corporate photography, with a resolution of 8k and a detailed skin texture showing every pore and hair
